response:
# Cheaper Alternatives to 15Five

## Free/Freemium Options
- **Google Forms/Microsoft Forms** - Basic feedback collection (free)
- **Lattice** - Starts lower; similar features
- **Culture Amp** - More affordable for small teams
- **Peakon** - Competitive pricing on engagement

## Budget-Friendly Platforms
- **Officevibe** - Lower cost, good for SMBs
- **Ally** - Simple, affordable check-in tool
- **Small Improvements** - Lower tier pricing available
- **Reflektive** - More affordable entry point
- **Motivosity** - Lighter-weight alternative

## DIY/Hybrid Approaches
- **Slack + custom workflows** - Use existing tools creatively
- **Airtable** - Build custom feedback systems ($20/user/month)
- **Notion** - Team templates for feedback tracking (free/cheap)

## What to Compare
- Per-user cost vs. flat rate
- Number of check-ins needed
- Integration requirements
- Analytics depth needed
- Team size

**Pro tip:** Many cheaper alternatives work well if you only need basic 1:1s and feedback, not the full 360 performance review suite that 15Five offers.

What specific features are most important to you? That would help narrow recommendations.
